what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-cf9e0aa5.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format with timezone.
The file id is att-360e5fd8 and the channel is dragnet-development.
standouts: target uses a board:// URI scheme referencing item-cf9e0aa5
record includes a precise added timestamp
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References external items with a board:// URI.
Timestamps use ISO 8601 with explicit timezone offset.
concerns: The file contains no content or context about what is being attached; its meaning depends entirely on the external board item.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-cf9e0aa5.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is the nature or title of board://item-cf9e0aa5?
purpose_vs_actual: The metadata indicates it is a board_items attachment linking to a board item, and that is exactly what it records.
intention_signals: To persist a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be looked up later.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting traceability without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items, linking attachment att-360e5fd8 to board item item-cf9e0aa5 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record when and which board item a channel attachment refers to for later lookup and correlation.
